The median factor is 0.599.

Converting 38.08:
38.08 * 0.599:
38.08 * 0.009 = 0.34272
38.08 * 0.090 = 3.42720
38.08 * 0.500 = 19.04000
0.34272 + 3.42720 = 3.76992
3.76992 + 19.04000 = 22.80992
= 22.809

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{22.809}
